title: YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Culturally and linguistically specific after-school activities, tutoring, youth academic advocacy, and parent engagement and education. Engages parents in group activities and provides in-home tutoring to support students' academic achievement. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6560 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (971) 271-6560 Ellen Parker [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Parent/Family Involvement in Education Tutoring Services Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SLAVIC AND EASTERN EUROPEAN CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION AND COUNSELING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS PUBLIC SAFETY - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
